risk_factors: Test code only with no production impact - this is purely test coverage enhancement
Large addition of 179 lines could indicate incomplete test review if not properly validated
Test assertions verify string output format which could break if Milvus query syntax changes
positive_findings: Comprehensive test coverage for MilvusFilterExpressionConverter edge cases
Well-structured test methods with clear naming and documentation comments
Proper use of AssertJ assertions and Spring AI filter expression patterns
Tests cover various data types including nulls, empty strings, booleans, and mixed types
Good coverage of complex scenarios like grouped expressions and special characters in keys
No hardcoded credentials or security-sensitive data in test code
Follows established Spring AI testing patterns and conventions
risk_summary: This PR adds comprehensive test coverage for the MilvusFilterExpressionConverter with no production code changes. The tests are well-structured and cover edge cases appropriately with no security concerns identified.
